title: Questions from Quarantine: Travel Plans and COVID-19
summary: The Security and Global Health Project is proud to present a weekly web series with Security Mom Juliette Kayyem and Medicine Mom Dr. Margaret Bourdeaux. Each week, our experts will answer your questions from quarantine and give you advice on staying sane and sanitary in a global crisis. We hope you'll join our Moms every Tuesday, and if you have a question that you want answered, tweet with #QuestionsFromQuarantine.
body: The Security and Global Health Project is proud to present a weekly web series with Security Mom Juliette Kayyem and Medicine Mom Dr. Margaret Bourdeaux. Each week our experts will answer your questions from quarantine and give you advice on staying sane and sanitary in a global crisis. We hope you'll join our Moms every Tuesday and if you have a question that you want answered tweet with #QuestionsFromQuarantine . result.main_content_en: The Security and Global Health Project hosts a weekly web series featuring experts Juliette Kayyem and Dr. Margaret Bourdeaux, who address audience questions submitted with the hashtag #QuestionsFromQuarantine. The series, titled 'Questions from Quarantine,' provides guidance on maintaining mental and physical well-being during the COVID-19 pandemic. This specific installment focuses on navigating travel plans amidst the ongoing public health crisis. The project encourages public participation by submitting questions via social media to be answered in subsequent weekly sessions.
result.main_content_zh: 安全与全球健康项目每周推出一个网络系列节目，由专家朱丽叶·凯耶姆和玛格丽特·布尔多博士主持。该系列名为“隔离期的问题”，旨在回答观众通过#QuestionsFromQuarantine标签提交的疑问，为全球危机期间保持身心健康提供建议。本期内容特别关注在COVID-19大流行背景下如何制定和调整旅行计划。项目鼓励公众通过社交媒体平台提出问题，以便在之后的每周会议中得到专家的解答。
